resources.string: Check installed apps against crowdsourced signing fingerprints.
View this app\'s source code on the GitHub website in your web browser
View this app\'s privacy policy in app
View this app\'s source code license in app
View open source licenses of code that Verified Apps uses in app
Use your wallpaper colors for the app theme (Android 12 and above)
Dynamic color requires Android 12 or newer. The app uses the default teal theme.
Replaces background with pitch black background when dark theme is on

Privacy Policy

This app does not store any data permanently other than preferences. This app does not make network connections itself. When you choose to submit an app that is not in the internal database, the app opens your web browser to a GitHub issue form with verification fields pre-filled from data already shown on screen; submitting that form is handled by GitHub in your browser.

This app can see which apps are installed on your device for the purpose of viewing information about them and checking them against the internal database. You can share and copy verification information to other apps using the share/copy buttons. Clipboard content is only used when you tap copy; it is not read otherwise.

You can provide an apk file to this app which will be temporarily stored in this app's cache directory and deleted as soon as it is done processing the needed information about the apk file.

Last updated: June 3, 2026.

MIT License

IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.
No apps match your search or filters
Select an APK file to read its signing certificate and check it against the internal database.
This app was not found in our internal database.
This app\'s verification info matches an entry in the internal database.
This app was found in the internal database, but its hash did not match. This app may be non-genuine.
Learn more at www.privacyguides.org in your web browser
Help Privacy Guides by making a donation in your web browser to support our non-profit mission
View the crowdsourced database repository on the GitHub website in your web browser
"Shows hasMultipleSigners in the app verification screen. This is useful for contributing to the internal verification info database."
Shows share and copy verification info buttons on the app verification screen

We don\'t have a record of this app (yet). Please submit the signing information below to our issue tracker. Our team will investigate the legitimacy of your submission, we\'ll let you know our findings, and you\'ll help contribute to our crowdsourced database!

It\'s possible this app is not legitimate, or this app is outdated, or our database is outdated. Please submit this fingerprint to our database, and our team will further investigate whether your copy of the app is legitimate and let you know in a reply online.
No browser found to open the Codeberg submission page.
Shows the Submit on GitHub button even when the app is already in the internal database
Shows a button to submit app fingerprints on Codeberg
When you submit an app to Codeberg, verification information will be copied to your clipboard automatically. You will need to paste it manually into the issue template form in your browser.
Include pre-installed system apps in the app list. Note that many of these apps are not eligible for submission!
